title: River Staircase: Head-Coupled Release Scheduling
strategies: constant-fraction bleed of current level every step, no lookahead (baseline)
myopic max-flow release every step to maximize instantaneous power (trap: collapses head, dumps un-buffered pulses downstream)

topological per-reservoir planning using the full known inflow series: a backward suffix-sum prices future capacity needs and proactively lowers the release target ahead of floods, otherwise holding a high-head target band (value-function / potential-energy ledger argument)
